notes: MiniMax reasoning-off UI heartbeat. When a model template ignores enable_thinking=false (MiniMax M2.5, some 2-bit JANG reasoning quants), server now emits SSE heartbeat chunks with token-count usage during suppressed reasoning so the Chat UI exits loading state and shows live progress instead of appearing hung. Chat IPC detects the heartbeat shape and emits metrics-only stream events. Zero behavior change for models that honor enable_thinking=false normally.
